## AI-103 Overview

 In this video, we're diving into the full crash course and practice Q&A for new Microsoft AI 103 certification exam.
 The Microsoft Azure AI Engineer Certification is designed for professionals who build, manage, and deploy AI solutions using Microsoft Foundry.
 This certification validates your expertise in leveraging Azure's powerful AI capabilities for real world applications.
 This foundation ensures you can effectively utilize the tools and technologies required for the exam and in your daily work as an Azure AI engineer.
 Your main responsibilities include planning and managing Azure AI solutions, implementing generative AI and agentic solutions as well as developing computer vision, text analysis, and information extraction solutions to address business needs.

 Your main responsibilities include planning and managing Azure AI solutions, implementing generative AI and agentic solutions as well as developing computer vision, text analysis, and information extraction solutions to address business needs.
 Natural language processing or NLP is a foundational area of AI.

 It integrates with vector stores, supports multiple document collections, and provides citations for transparency.
